Patch Set 1:

@Morgan, how should the failures be interpreted? Looks like the are not related to VID.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> @Morgan, how should the failures be interpreted? Looks like the are not related to VID.

here as all the VIP pods are up&running and the VID healthcheck is PASS => I vote +2
as you mention the errors are not related to VID
When releaseing El Alto, master was clean..but some projects merged code that lead to errors..that is why I re explain the 3 steps gating during the PTL meeting :)
But this kind of issues explain why we did not implement a vote from the deployer..because most of the time errors are not related to the patchset

Patch Set 1:

Thanks, Morgan. I suppose we will learn as we go. :)

Can you please merge (including parents, though)?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Thanks, Morgan. I suppose we will learn as we go. :)
> 
> Can you please merge (including parents, though)?

I have the power to merge but as it is a patch in OOM project, I would prefer that someone from OOM does it.
Usually Sylvain is the office next door but he is sunbathing in Tenerife this week. 
If nobody from OOM merges it before tomorrow, I will do.
Change has been successfully merged by Morgan Richomme
